description: Design a lab-scale wind turbine and generate its power curve. Generate a NACA 4415 airfoil and perform XFoil analysis at Reynolds = 300,000 with 360-degree extrapolation. Design a blade named 'LabBlade' with a length of 1.0 m, constant chord of 0.1 m, and 0 degrees twist using the NACA 4415 airfoil for all sections. Define a rotor named 'LabRotor' with 3 blades and a hub radius of 0.1 m. Run a dimensional BEM simulation with a wind speed sweep from 4 m/s to 20 m/s in 1 m/s steps at a fixed rotational speed of 500 RPM and 0 degrees pitch. Export the power vs wind speed results to /home/ga/Documents/projects/lab_power_curve.txt.
